mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(L.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS monthly, SUM(D.price * D.quantity) AS total_sales FROM order_detail D INNER JOIN order_list_map L ON D.order_id = L.order_id WHERE (L.reg_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -5), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(SYSDATE)) OR (L.reg_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -17), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12))) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(L.reg_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY monthly ASC

SELECT TO_CHAR(COMPLETE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS monthly, SUM(get_point) AS total_point FROM ORDER_TBL WHERE (COMPLETE_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -5), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(SYSDATE)) OR (COMPLETE_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -17), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12))) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(COMPLETE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY monthly ASC

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_id, m.member_email, (SELECT NVL(SUM(d.price * d.quantity), 0) FROM order_detail d WHERE d.order_id = o.order_id) AS total_price, o.delivery_type, s.store_name, o.order_status AS order_status, m.member_thumb FROM order_tbl o JOIN member_tbl m ON o.member_id = m.member_id JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC

SELECT m.menu_name AS menu_name, m.menu_image AS menu_image, d.quantity, d.price, d.option_string AS options, o.delivery_type FROM order_detail d JOIN order_tbl o ON d.order_id = o.order_id JOIN menu_tbl m ON d.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT d.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_image, d.option_string, d.quantity FROM order_detail d JOIN menu_tbl m ON d.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT r.member_id AS memberId, m.member_thumb AS memberProfile, r.order_id AS orderId, r.review_rating AS reviewRating, TO_CHAR(r.review_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reviewDate, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.review_thumb AS reviewThumb, LISTAGG(o.menu_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY o.menu_name) AS menuName, rc.review_comment_content AS reviewCommentContent, TO_CHAR(rc.review_comment_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS reviewCommentDate, s.store_name AS storeName FROM review_tbl r JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id JOIN order_detail od ON r.order_id = od.order_id JOIN menu_tbl o ON od.menu_id = o.menu_id JOIN order_tbl ot ON r.order_id = ot.order_id JOIN store_tbl s ON ot.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, review_comment_content, review_comment_date FROM ( SELECT rc.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY rc.order_id ORDER BY rc.review_comment_date DESC ) AS rn FROM review_comment_tbl rc ) WHERE rn = 1 ) rc ON r.order_id = rc.order_id GROUP BY r.member_id, m.member_thumb, r.order_id, r.review_rating, r.review_date, r.review_content, r.review_thumb, rc.review_comment_content, rc.review_comment_date, s.store_name ORDER BY r.order_id DESC
